summary: The imported ehrlab seed preserves the cross-profile governance boundary: ehrlab exports sanitized capability/health summaries to general, while general governs via proposals rather than raw cross-profile access.

decisions.text: ehrlab participates in harness governance through sanitized exports rather than raw graph or sensitive data sharing.
general reads sanitized exports and produces governance proposals; it does not directly mutate ehrlab local graph state.

requirements.text: ehrlab must emit sanitized capability summary and graph health report artifacts for governance consumption.

constraints.text: Raw EHR, patient-level data, credentials, and sensitive schema cannot be exported from ehrlab into general.
